VisXplore 2.0.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

VisXplore() VisX()
Run the VisXplore application
as.data.frame(<visx_cor>)
Convert visx_cor to data.frame
corstars()
Correlation and association matrix
data_check()
Check for columns that are empty or identical
get_r2()
R-squared
make_bar()
Visualize categorical variables
make_hist()
Visualize numeric variables
npc_mixed_cor()
Network Plot of Association
pair_cor()
Calculate association measure between a pair of variables
pairwise_cor()
Calculate pairwise association of data with mixed types of variables
plot(<visx_cor>)
Plot method for visx_cor objects
print(<visx_check>)
Print method for visx_check objects
print(<visx_cor>)
Print method for visx_cor objects
summary(<visx_cor>)
Summary method for visx_cor objects
visx_collapse_levels()
Collapse levels of a categorical variable
visx_mean_vars()
Compute row-wise mean of selected columns
visx_ratio()
Compute ratio of two columns
visx_transform()
Apply univariate transformation to selected columns

Developed by Ryan Peterson, Ying Jin, Carsten Goerg.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
